mapper.sql: id, source_id, order_no, item_no, split_no, model_no, quantity, latest_delivery_time, src_delivery_time, transtype_code, reason_code, remark, newest, del_flag, create_time, creat_user, update_time, updator, delivery_H, delivery_W
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_po_delivery_plan
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_po_delivery_plan (id, source_id, order_no, item_no, split_no, model_no, quantity, latest_delivery_time, src_delivery_time, transtype_code, reason_code, remark, newest, del_flag, create_time, creat_user, update_time, updator, delivery_H, delivery_W) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{latestDeliveryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{newest,jdbcType=BIT}, #{delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creatUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deliveryH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliveryW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.ops_po_delivery_plan
id,
source_id,
order_no,
item_no,
split_no,
model_no,
quantity,
latest_delivery_time,
src_delivery_time,
transtype_code,
reason_code,
remark,
newest,
del_flag,
create_time,
creat_user,
update_time,
updator,
delivery_H,
delivery_W,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_po_delivery_plan
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
source_id = #{record.sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
latest_delivery_time = #{record.latestDeliveryTime,jdbcType=DATE},
src_delivery_time = #{record.srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
transtype_code = #{record.transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reason_code = #{record.reasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
newest = #{record.newest,jdbcType=BIT},
del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creat_user = #{record.creatUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delivery_H = #{record.deliveryH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delivery_W = #{record.deliveryW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_po_delivery_plan set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, source_id = #{record.sourceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, latest_delivery_time = #{record.latestDeliveryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, src_delivery_time = #{record.srcDeliveryTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, transtype_code = #{record.transtypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reason_code = #{record.reasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, newest = #{record.newest,jdbcType=BIT}, del_flag = #{record.delFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creat_user = #{record.creatUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delivery_H = #{record.deliveryH,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delivery_W = #{record.deliveryW,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}
